review_text: The battery life on this phone is absolutely amazing. I can go two days without charging!
The camera quality is terrible in low light. Very grainy.
Great headphones, the noise cancellation works perfectly for my daily commute.
They broke after just two weeks of use. Flimsy build quality.
The new UI is so intuitive and fast. Best software update ever.
Battery is good, but the screen scratches easily.
Excellent bass and clear treble. The best noise cancellation I've experienced.
The app keeps crashing when I try to sync my data.
Overheats when playing games. Not happy with this purchase.
Very comfortable to wear for long periods. Wish they came with a hard case.
Setup was a breeze, connected to my Wi-Fi in seconds.
Range is very limited. If I go to the next room, it disconnects.
